Done — I scheduled a 1-hour "Follow-up Meeting" on 2024-05-19 from 11:30 to 12:30 with the description: "Follow-up to review progress, outstanding items, and next steps." I invited only you (emma.johnson@bluesparrowtech.com). 

Notes:
- I couldn't schedule it at 10:00 because you already have "Project Kick-off" from 10:00–11:00 and a "One-on-One with Manager" from 11:00–11:30 that day.
